privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the synthetically generated GNU Health demo database, targeting a pre-existing patient named Roberto Carlos. The medical domain knowledge is accurate: T60 is the real ICD-10 code for pesticide toxicity, Cholinesterase is the correct lab marker, and Atropine is the standard antidote for severe bradycardia. The verifier strictly enforces a maximum heart rate of 55 bpm and a follow-up appointment window precisely between 7 and 14 days.
